code: import api from'./api';export const getChansons=()=>api.get('/chansons');export const getChanson=id=>api.get("/chansons/".concat(id));export const createChanson=data=>api.post('/chansons',data);export const createChansonWithMusic=formData=>api.post('/chansons/create',formData,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}});export const updateChanson=(id,data)=>api.put("/chansons/".concat(id),data);export const updateChansonWithMusic=(id,formData)=>api.put("/chansons/".concat(id),formData,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}});export const deleteChanson=id=>api.delete("/chansons/".concat(id));
